case_title: MARCELLIS DENZELL SHAW ET AL VS. GHULAM JANJUA

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY SHAW, MARCELLIS DENZELL CHAIREZ, JESSE JANJUA, GHULAM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAW, MARCELLIS DENZELL CHAIREZ, JESSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JANJUA, GHULAM $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,860.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF MARCELLIS DENZELL SHAW IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JESSE CHAIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GHULAM JANJUA IS PRESENT. OTHER APPEARANCES: DEFENDANT WITNESSES, TOUFIC HINDAWI, TUFAIL AHMAD, HUMZAH JANJUA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 FILED BY SHAW, MARCELLIS DENZELL CHAIREZ, JESSE AS TO DEFENDANT JANJUA, GHULAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-10-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-29-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85. SERVED APR-11-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JANJUA, GHULAM
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JANJUA, GHULAM
